nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: American Ornithological Society
nodes.summary: American Ornithological Society是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联80种鸟类，包括黑頭鴨、绿翅雁、Chaco chachalaca等80种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 康乃爾鳥類學實驗室
nodes.summary: 康乃爾鳥類學實驗室是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括Pelzeln's tody-tyrant、Black-capped pygmy tyrant、Straneck's tyrannulet等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Southern martin
nodes.summary: Southern martin（Southern martin，学名 Progne elegans），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联2个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛、稀树草原。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Downloaded from https://datazone.birdlife.org/species/factsheet/southern-martin-progne-elegans on January 23, 2026 The Cornell Lab of Ornithology's Birds of the World states that it breeds in southern Bolivia and Argentina and spends the austral winter in Brazil, Colombia, and Peru "but possibly also as far [north] as [eastern] Panama"

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It further notes that some may overwinter in Argentina, that it has been recorded in Uruguay, and that it is accidental in the Malvinas/Falklands and Florida. The American Ornithological Society states that the species breeds in Argentina, Bolivia, Paraguay, and Uruguay and winters in Brazil, Colombia, and Peru

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: | pages =456 }} The southern martin inhabits a variety of semi-open to open landscapes including grasslands, woodlands, scrublands, and areas of human habitation. As is the case with the species' range, its upper elevation limit differs among sources
